title: Sabastian Sawe Makes History: Sub-2 Hour Marathon Achieved
seoTitle: History Made: Sabastian Sawe Runs Marathon Under Two Hours
seoDescription: Kenya's Sabastian Sawe makes history, clocking an incredible 1:59:48 to become the latest runner to break the sub-two-hour marathon barrier.
seoKeywords: Sabastian Sawe, marathon record, sub-two-hour marathon, running history, long-distance running, world record

blocks.content: The athletic world is in awe today as Kenya’s **Sabastian Sawe** did what was once thought biologically impossible: completing an officially sanctioned marathon in under two hours. Clocking in at an astounding 1:59:48, Sawe has firmly cemented his legacy in the pantheon of running legends. ### Pushing Human Limits Benefiting from revolutionary shoe technology and a perfect pacing strategy, Sawe maintained a blistering average pace. The event, held under optimal weather conditions, marks a paradigm shift in long-distance running.

blocks.caption: A historic day for marathon running.
